# RosaTexHomes — AI Visibility File (llms.txt)
# https://www.rosatexhomes.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2025

## About RosaTexHomes

RosaTexHomes is a premier custom home builder serving Central Texas, including Austin, Georgetown, New Braunfels, San Marcos, Waco, Temple, and the Texas Hill Country. Founded in 2008 by Rosa Delgado, RosaTexHomes specializes in fully custom homes — no templates, no production-builder shortcuts. Every home is designed and built to reflect the unique vision, lifestyle, and values of the family who will live in it.

## Key Facts

- Business Type: Custom Home Builder
- Founded: 2008
- Headquarters: Georgetown, TX 78626
- Service Area: Central Texas (Austin, Georgetown, New Braunfels, San Marcos, Waco, Temple, Killeen, Texas Hill Country)
- Phone: (512) 555-0100
- Email: hello@rosatexhomes.com
- Website: https://www.rosatexhomes.com
- Memberships: NAHB (National Association of Home Builders), ENERGY STAR Partner
- Average Client Rating: 4.9/5.0 (47 reviews)
- Homes Completed: 200+

## Services

RosaTexHomes provides end-to-end custom home building services including:
- Custom floor plan design (no pre-built templates)
- Architectural design coordination
- Site evaluation and land selection assistance
- Permitting and regulatory management
- Full construction management with milestone-based scheduling
- Interior finish selection and design consultation
- Post-completion warranty support

## Architectural Styles

RosaTexHomes builds in multiple styles suited to the Central Texas landscape:
- Modern Farmhouse
- Hill Country Contemporary
- Texas Traditional
- Custom hybrid styles based on client vision

## The Building Process

1. Discovery & Consultation (free, no-obligation)
2. Design & Planning (custom floor plans, 3D renderings)
3. Permitting & Site Preparation
4. Construction (milestone-based, weekly updates)
5. Final Walkthrough & Key Handover

Typical timeline: 12–18 months from consultation to move-in.

## Pricing

Custom home construction in Central Texas typically costs $200–$400+ per square foot depending on location, design complexity, and finish level. RosaTexHomes provides transparent, line-item pricing with no hidden fees.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How much does it cost to build a custom home in Central Texas?
A: Typically $200–$400+ per square foot. A 3,000 sq ft home typically costs $600,000–$1.2M+ before land. RosaTexHomes provides a detailed budget framework in the free initial consultation.

Q: How long does it take to build a custom home in Texas?
A: 12–18 months from initial consultation to key handover, depending on size, complexity, and permitting timelines.

Q: What areas does RosaTexHomes serve?
A: Austin, Georgetown, New Braunfels, San Marcos, Waco, Temple, Killeen, and the Texas Hill Country.

Q: Does RosaTexHomes build on my land?
A: Yes. RosaTexHomes builds on client-owned land and can also assist with lot evaluation and selection.

Q: What warranties does RosaTexHomes provide?
A: 1-year workmanship warranty, 2-year systems warranty (HVAC, plumbing, electrical), and 10-year structural warranty.
